name: TPM
description: Trusted Platform Module (TPM) hardware component providing a platform root of trust, secure key storage, attestation capabilities, and platform configuration registers. Variants include discrete, firmware (fTPM), integrated, and virtual TPM implementations.
purpose: Provide hardware-rooted cryptographic functions, secure key storage, and platform attestation to support measured boot and device identity features.

name: Secure Boot
description: Pre-boot integrity enforcement mechanism that validates signatures of bootloader and firmware components against authorized keys and signature stores to help ensure platform boot integrity.
purpose: Enforce verification of pre-OS images and boot components to reduce the risk of unauthorized or tampered boot software executing on the platform.

name: Antivirus
description: Endpoint security agent that performs signature-based and heuristic scanning, and other detection techniques to identify and mitigate known malware and suspicious files.
purpose: Detect and mitigate known malicious software via signature updates, heuristic analysis, and scanning engines while integrating with endpoint management and update services.

name: EDR Agent
description: Endpoint Detection and Response (EDR) agent that collects telemetry (process, file, network, registry, and memory activity) and provides analysis, hunting, and containment capabilities.
purpose: Enable detection, investigation, and response to advanced threats by aggregating telemetry, applying behavioral analytics, and supporting containment or remediation actions.
related_entities: User and Entity Behavior Analytics Agent
Security Information and Event Management Forwarder
